chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1721 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on CMA No.6774/25 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 15.10.2025 Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Counsel for the petitioner does not press the instant petition on the ground that the petitioner is Civil Servant and for redressal of his grievance, he will approach the Service Tribunal. Under instructions, instant petition is hereby dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
